summary: test_workflow_review_pair_must_name_a_registered_harness rejects review_harness='cursor' (valid review_model isolates it from the pair-completeness check) with a specific InvalidWorkflow match; sibling tests accept a registered 'codex' pair and leave an unset pair unchecked — the membership check is genuinely exercised, though the service/discovery call-site wiring of validate_registration(HARNESSES) is itself untested (minor residual)
